Name: Add Comments and Cancel Actions in SauceDemo
Description: Browse through issues, add comments, and test the cancel functionality before verifying the home page.
Test Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to /browse/*
Step 2: Click on p Description
Step 3: Click on textarea Description
Step 4: Enter input value in textarea Description
Step 5: Click on button Cancel
Step 6: Click on link All
Step 7: Click on div AddComment
Step 8: Click on link AddComment
Step 9: Enter input value in textarea Comment
Step 10: Click on button Visual
Step 11: Click on div TabsPlaceholder
Step 12: Click on button Add
Step 13: Click on link AddComment
Step 14: Click on link Cancel -> Navigate to page ''
Step 15: Take full page screenshot as checkpoint

Name: Manage Bug Issues in SauceDemo Dashboard
Description: Navigate to the dashboard, create a bug issue by filling in the details, assign it to yourself, and verify the home page.
Test Steps:
Step 1: Navigate to /secure/Dashboard.jspa
Step 2: Click on link dashboardActions (Create)
Step 3: Click on input IssueType
Step 4: Click on link bugPriority (Bug)
Step 5: Click on input Summary
Step 6: Enter input value in input Summary
Step 7: Click on textarea Description
Step 8: Enter input value in textarea Description
Step 9: Click on input Priority
Step 10: Click on link bugPriority (Lowest)
Step 11: Click on textarea Labels
Step 12: Click on span Labels
Step 13: Click on link Test
Step 14: Click on button AssignToMe
Step 15: Click on input CreateIssueSubmit
Step 16: Click on link dashboardActions (Projects)
Step 17: Click on link ProjectName -> Navigate to page '/projects/*/issues/*'
Step 18: Click on span AssignToMe
Step 19: Click on link AssignToMe -> Navigate to page ''
Step 20: Take full page screenshot as checkpoint
